description: Recommends production-ready Golang libraries and frameworks. Apply when the user explicitly asks for library suggestions, wants to compare alternatives, needs to choose a library for a specific task, or when a new dependency is being added to the project.
representativeQueries: What Go library should I use for HTTP requests?
Compare Go web frameworks for our project needs
Recommend a production-ready database driver for Go
Should I use an external library or stdlib for this?
Find the best Go logging library with structured output
